prompt_latex: The variable $y$ varies directly with $x$. The sum of the values of $y$ at $x=4$ and $x=7$ is $33$. What is $y$ when $x=10$?
solution_latex: If $y=kx$, then $33=k(4+7)$, so $k=3$. Therefore $y=3\cdot 10=30$.
